description: Lap 1 rewrites seed/contract.md to add the missing 'Effective Date' definition to the Definitions section, in the same bolded-quoted style as the existing entries. All existing bolded usages in the body are left untouched, so check_defined.py exits 0 on lap 1. Demonstrates the canonical loop reaching DONE with zero API keys and zero external tools.

interactions.agent_output: Ran check_defined.py: 1 bolded term used but not defined — Effective Date. Adding a definition for Effective Date to the Definitions section in the same style as the existing entries. Not unbolding any usage and not touching the checker.

actions.content:
# Master Services Agreement

This Master Services Agreement (the "**Agreement**") is entered into as of
the **Effective Date** by and between the parties identified in the
signature block below.

## Definitions

- **"Agreement"** means this Master Services Agreement, together with all
  exhibits, schedules, and amendments hereto.
- **"Services"** means the professional services described in one or more
  Statements of Work executed under this Agreement.
- **"Confidential Information"** means any non-public information disclosed
  by either party that is designated as confidential or that reasonably
  should be understood to be confidential.
- **"Effective Date"** means the date first written above on which this
  Agreement is executed by both parties, as set forth in the signature
  block.

## Scope of Services

Provider shall perform the **Services** described in each Statement of
Work in accordance with the terms of this **Agreement**. All work shall
be completed on or before the delivery dates specified therein.

## Confidentiality

Each party shall protect the other party's **Confidential Information**
using at least the same degree of care it uses to protect its own
confidential information, but in no event less than a reasonable degree
of care.

## Term

This Agreement commences on the **Effective Date** and continues until
terminated in accordance with its terms.

interactions.notes: The fix — check_defined.py now exits 0. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless, no external tool.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
